title: NxTNT Tag
description: “A fast-paced TNT Tag mini-game plugin for Minecraft servers. Run, tag, and survive the explosions with lobby & arena setup, custom wand, and full configuration support.”
body:
## 📖 NxTNTTag – TNT Tag Minigame Plugin

NxTNTTag is a **fun and fast-paced TNT Tag mini-game** for Minecraft servers!
Run, tag, and survive explosions before the timer runs out. The game is fully configurable and comes with a custom setup wand for easy lobby/arena creation.

---

## ✨ Features

* 🎮 Classic **TNT Tag gameplay** – run, punch, and pass the TNT before time’s up.
* 🛠️ Easy setup with **/ntt wand**, **/ntt setlobby**, and **/ntt setarena**.
* ⚙️ Fully configurable messages and settings.
* 🧨 Automatic TNT transfer & elimination system.
* 🏆 Winner announcement at the end of the match.
* 📍 Support for lobby & arena regions.

---

## 📜 Commands

* `/ntt join` → Join the TNT Tag lobby.
* `/ntt leave` → Leave the game.
* `/ntt start` → Start the match (admin).
* `/ntt stop` → Stop the match (admin).
* `/ntt wand` → Get the **NTT Axe** to select regions.
* `/ntt setlobby` → Set lobby region (after selecting pos1 & pos2).
* `/ntt setarena` → Set arena region (after selecting pos1 & pos2).

---

## 🔑 Permissions

* `nxtnttag.admin` → Access to setup & admin commands.
* `nxtnttag.play` → Join and play TNT Tag.

---

## ⚙️ Config Example

```yaml
settings:
  min-players: 2
  round-time: 30
  explosion-radius: 4
  messages:
    prefix: "&c[&eNxTNTTag&c] "
    join: "&a{player} joined the TNT Tag game!"
    leave: "&c{player} left the TNT Tag game!"
    start: "&eThe game has started!"
    win: "&6{player} is the winner!"

support:
  discord: "https://discord.gg/2hC6EHpdtj"
```

---

## 📌 Support

Need help or want to give feedback?
👉 Join our support Discord: **[https://discord.gg/2hC6EHpdtj](https://discord.gg/2hC6EHpdtj)**
